Description: Outcome: App, backend, and infra scaffolded.

Summary: Initialize mobile app shell and navigation
Acceptance Criteria: App launches with tab/navigation skeleton and environment switching.

Summary: Initialize backend service and health endpoints
Acceptance Criteria: `/health` and `/version` return expected metadata in dev/stage.

Summary: Provision storage buckets and CDN config
Acceptance Criteria: Public/private media buckets and signed URL flow configured.

Summary: Set up CI for lint, typecheck, unit tests
Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-001, HON-002.
Acceptance Criteria: Pull request checks run and block on failures.
Structured logs include request id, user id (if available), and error class.

Summary: Design auth UX (email + one social provider)
Acceptance Criteria: Signed-off auth flow and edge states documented.
Endpoints implemented with validation, rate limiting, and session handling.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-010, HON-011.
Acceptance Criteria: User can sign up, log in, log out, and session persists after restart.
Authenticated user data returned for app bootstrap.
`signup_completed` and login events tracked once per success.

Description: Outcome: Users can create journeys and view progress timeline.

Acceptance Criteria: `journeys` table and indexes applied in dev/stage.

Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-020, HON-011.
Acceptance Criteria: User can create/list/update/archive own journeys only.

Summary: Build journeys list and create/edit screens
Acceptance Criteria: User can create and manage multiple journeys from home screen.

Summary: Implement timeline API (paginated clips by journey)
Acceptance Criteria: Clips returned newest-first with day labels and metadata.
Timeline displays clips, day index, streak summary, and record CTA.

Description: Outcome: Users can record, upload, and playback clips.

Summary: Build record camera flow (5-10 sec guided)
Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-001, HON-022.
Acceptance Criteria: User can record and preview a clip with duration guidance.

Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-003, HON-011.
Acceptance Criteria: Endpoint returns valid signed URL for authenticated user journey.

Summary: Implement clip create/replace API + uniqueness rule
Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-031, HON-020.
Acceptance Criteria: One clip/day/journey enforced, with replace support.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-030, HON-031, HON-032.
Acceptance Criteria: Clip uploads reliably and appears in timeline on save.

Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-003, HON-032.
Acceptance Criteria: Derivative video + thumbnail generated and status updated.
User can play clip full screen with smooth startup.

Description: Outcome: Users can view auto comparisons and milestone renders.

Acceptance Criteria: Day1/7/30 vs latest candidates selected correctly when available.

Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-040, HON-034.
Acceptance Criteria: Comparison job queues, renders, and updates status/output URL.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-041, HON-024.
Acceptance Criteria: User can open, play, and retry comparison renders.
Milestones trigger once per journey at valid day counts.

Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-043, HON-034.
Acceptance Criteria: Montage renders and is retrievable in milestone list.
User can view generated milestone videos with date/day context.

Description: Outcome: Reminders and streak logic are reliable.

Acceptance Criteria: Current and longest streak update correctly by user timezone.

Summary: Expose streak endpoint and timeline integration
Acceptance Criteria: Journey detail API includes streak values.
User can configure reminder toggles and local reminder time.
User can enable/disable reminders and set local time.
Daily reminders send at configured local time with retries.

Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-044, HON-054.
Acceptance Criteria: User sees celebration card and receives milestone completion notice.

Description: Outcome: Users can export and share progress videos.
Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-041, HON-044.
Acceptance Criteria: Export requests logged with media type and completion status.

Summary: Build mobile export to local media library
Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-042, HON-045.
Acceptance Criteria: User can save rendered video to device gallery.
User can share exported media through native share options.
`export_started` and `export_completed` tracked correctly.

Description: Outcome: Product metrics, testing, and stability gates are in place.

Summary: Implement event tracking schema and client
Acceptance Criteria: Event pipeline validates and stores core event payloads.

Summary: Integrate MVP event catalog in mobile
Acceptance Criteria: All PRD events emitted at expected user actions.

Summary: Add backend unit/integration test suite for core APIs
Description: Owner: Backend. Depends on: HON-021, HON-032, HON-041.
Acceptance Criteria: Critical APIs have happy/edge-path coverage and CI enforcement.

Summary: Add mobile test coverage for core flows
Description: Owner: Mobile. Depends on: HON-033, HON-042, HON-053.
Acceptance Criteria: Smoke tests cover auth, record, timeline, comparison flow.

Summary: Performance pass: timeline, playback, render queue
Acceptance Criteria: Meets NFR thresholds for startup, playback start, render reliability.

Description: Outcome: Beta rollout, docs, and release checklist complete.

Summary: Write beta test plan and bug triage workflow
Acceptance Criteria: Test plan includes device matrix and severity SLA definitions.

Summary: Prepare privacy policy and account deletion flow copy
Acceptance Criteria: Legal/privacy copy finalized and reflected in-app.

Summary: Build release checklist and rollback playbook
Acceptance Criteria: Versioning, rollback steps, and on-call ownership documented.

Summary: Run closed beta, capture feedback, triage top issues
Description: Owner: Cross-functional. Depends on: HON-080, HON-082.
Acceptance Criteria: Top-priority beta issues resolved or accepted with rationale.

Summary: Launch readiness review and go/no-go decision
Acceptance Criteria: Stakeholders approve metrics, quality, and support readiness.
